component.name: Disc Printer
component.summary: Universal disc label editor for Linux

description.p: Disc Printer is a universal CD/DVD/Blu-ray label editor for Linux that works with any disc-capable printer — no proprietary software required. Printer detection is fully automatic: the application analyses installed CUPS PPD files to identify compatible devices.

ul.li: Multiple image layers with move, scale, rotate, flip, lock and visibility
Per-image opacity, brightness and contrast sliders
Text elements with font, size, style and colour control
Save and load designs as .discprint files

description.p: Initial release with full layer editing, undo/redo, and 34-language support.
